title: Black Lotus Motel
description:
• 2-Player Online Co-op: Create a room and play online with a friend.

• First-Person Controller: Move, jump, crouch, sprint, and upgrade your movement.

• Bottle Shooting Mechanic: Drink and throw Macabra bottles, but don’t overdo it.

• 16 Co-op Challenges: Solve cooperative puzzles to progress through the game.

• Timed Run: Beat the game before time runs out, or speedrun it in 25 minutes.

• Toxic Tide: Survive a 72-hour cycle as the tide rises at dawn and falls at dusk.

• Passwords: Hunt for passwords and unlock 3 keys to access new motel areas.

• Achievements: Unlock 20 achievements and chase the World Record. 

 

THANK YOU FOR PLAYING AND HAVE A NICE STAY!

If you liked it, your review would be so helpful! If you'd like, we can stay in touch over Discord to tell you about future projects.
description_short: Can you and a friend escape from a deserted roadside motel before it gets swallowed up by the toxic tide?
